summary: Comprehensive testing of QB-style Receive Payments page (PaymentsPage.js) rewrite with discount feature. All 32 frontend tests PASSED. Backend API tests: 9 passed, 1 skipped. The QuickBooks-style layout is fully functional with customer search, payment method icons, invoice table with discount column, interest/penalty generation, and payment submission with discounts.

issues: React hydration warning about <span> inside <tbody>/<tr> - caused by development mode instrumentation, not affecting functionality

verified_working: Customer search with dropdown showing AR balance (data-testid='payment-customer-search')
Payment method icon buttons: Cash, Check, Bank Transfer, GCash, Maya (data-testid='pay-method-{name}')
Outstanding Transactions table with columns: Date, Number, Type, Orig. Amt, Amt. Due, Discount, Payment (data-testid='invoices-table')
Discount column shows input for interest/penalty invoices only, dash for regular invoices
Discount toggle between % and fixed amount (₱) mode works
Totals row at bottom of table sums correctly
Generate Interest/Penalty Charges section (collapsible) with preview
Amounts for Selected Invoices summary panel (data-testid='payment-summary')
Payment submission with discounts works correctly - toast shows 'applied ₱X discounted to Y invoice(s)'

frontend.5_payment_method_buttons: PASS - Cash, Check, Bank Transfer, GCash, Maya all present
frontend.12_table_columns: PASS - Date, Number, Type, Orig. Amt, Amt. Due, Discount, Payment
frontend.21_discount_inputs: PASS - Present for interest/penalty invoices only
frontend.32_payment_applied_and_cleared: PASS - Toast shows 'applied ₱100.00 discounted to 2 invoice(s)'

backend.test_receive_payment_with_discount: SKIPPED - No interest invoice left after previous test

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warnings about <span> inside <tbody>/<tr> in console - caused by development mode instrumentation, not affecting functionality
Observation: Discount feature correctly restricts discounts to interest_charge and penalty_charge invoice types only
Observation: Auto-apply correctly prioritizes interest/penalty invoices first, then distributes to regular invoices
Observation: Payment with discount correctly reduces both payment applied and discount from customer balance
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Credit Customer 264ebc6f with open invoices
context_for_next_testing_agent: QB-style Payments Page fully tested and working. Credit Customer 264ebc6f has remaining balance ₱3,376.52 with 6 open invoices (no interest invoices remaining - all paid). Discount feature verified working on interest/penalty invoices. All data-testid attributes properly set for automation.
